<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Abdul Salam — Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700;900&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
:root {
  --navy: #0a0f1e;
  --deep: #0d1530;
  --card: #111827;
  --border: #1e2d4a;
  --gold: #c8922a;
  --gold2: #f0b429;
  --teal: #14b8a6;
  --text: #e2e8f0;
  --muted: #8899aa;
  --white: #ffffff;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{
  background:var(--navy);
  color:var(--text);
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;
  overflow-x:hidden;
}

/* NAV */
nav{
  position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;z-index:100;
  background:rgba(10,15,30,0.92);
  backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:0 2rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  height:64px;
}
.nav-logo{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;
  font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--gold2));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2rem}
.nav-links a{
  color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:.88rem;
  font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.05em;
  transition:color .2s;
}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--gold2)}

/* HERO */
.hero{
  min-height:100vh;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  padding:6rem 2rem 4rem;
}
.hero-bg{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 30%, #1a2a4a 0%, var(--navy) 70%);
}
.hero-orb{
  position:absolute;
  border-radius:50%;
  filter:blur(80px);
  opacity:.18;
  animation:float 8s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.orb1{width:500px;height:500px;background:var(--gold);top:-100px;left:-100px;animation-delay:0s}
.orb2{width:400px;height:400px;background:var(--teal);bottom:-80px;right:-80px;animation-delay:3s}
@keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-30px)}}

.hero-content{position:relative;z-index:2;text-align:center;max-width:800px}
.hero-badge{
  display:inline-block;
  background:rgba(200,146,42,.12);
  border:1px solid rgba(200,146,42,.4);
  color:var(--gold2);
  font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.15em;
  padding:.4rem 1.2rem;border-radius:20px;
  margin-bottom:1.5rem;text-transform:uppercase;
}
.hero h1{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;
  font-size:clamp(3rem,8vw,5.5rem);
  font-weight:900;
  line-height:1.05;
  margin-bottom:1rem;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff 0%,var(--gold2) 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.hero-sub{
  font-size:1.15rem;color:var(--muted);
  margin-bottom:2.5rem;line-height:1.6;
}
.hero-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.7rem;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:2.5rem}
.tag{
  background:rgba(20,184,166,.1);
  border:1px solid rgba(20,184,166,.35);
  color:var(--teal);
  padding:.35rem .9rem;border-radius:20px;
  font-size:.82rem;font-weight:500;
}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.btn-primary{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold),var(--gold2));
  color:#0a0f1e;font-weight:700;
  padding:.85rem 2rem;border-radius:8px;
  text-decoration:none;font-size:.95rem;
  transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;
}
.btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(200,146,42,.4)}
.btn-sec{
  background:transparent;
  border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);
  padding:.85rem 2rem;border-radius:8px;
  text-decoration:none;font-size:.95rem;
  transition:border-color .2s;
}
.btn-sec:hover{border-color:var(--gold)}

/* SECTIONS */
section{padding:6rem 2rem}
.section-inner{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto}
.section-label{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;
  margin-bottom:.8rem;
}
.section-label span{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:.75rem;color:var(--gold2);letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;
}
.section-label::after{
  content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--border);
}
.section-title{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;
  font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,2.8rem);
  font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem;
}
.section-desc{color:var(--muted);font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:3rem;max-width:600px}

/* ABOUT / EVENT */
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3rem;align-items:start}
@media(max-width:700px){.about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.about-text p{color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:1rem;font-size:1rem}
.about-text strong{color:var(--gold2)}

/* EVENT GALLERY */
.event-section{background:var(--deep)}
.event-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));
  gap:1rem;
}
.event-card{
  position:relative;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;
  aspect-ratio:4/3;cursor:pointer;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  transition:transform .3s,box-shadow .3s;
}
.event-card:hover{transform:scale(1.02);box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}
.event-card img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.event-card-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(to top, rgba(10,15,30,.95) 0%, transparent 50%);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;
  padding:1rem;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;
}
.event-card:hover .event-card-overlay{opacity:1}
.event-card-title{color:#fff;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:600;line-height:1.3}

/* FEATURED EVENT CARD */
.event-featured{
  grid-column:1/-1;
  aspect-ratio:16/7;
}

/* PROJECTS */
.projects-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(340px,1fr));gap:1.5rem}
@media(max-width:600px){.projects-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.project-card{
  background:var(--card);
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;
  transition:transform .3s,border-color .3s;
}
.project-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);border-color:var(--gold)}
.project-thumb{
  width:100%;aspect-ratio:16/9;object-fit:cover;display:block;
  background:#1a2038;
}
.project-body{padding:1.5rem}
.project-meta{
  display:flex;gap:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:.8rem;
}
.project-tag{
  font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.08em;
  padding:.2rem .7rem;border-radius:20px;
  background:rgba(200,146,42,.12);color:var(--gold2);
  border:1px solid rgba(200,146,42,.25);
}
.project-card h3{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.25rem;margin-bottom:.5rem}
.project-card p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:1rem}
.project-links{display:flex;gap:.8rem}
.project-link{
  font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--teal);text-decoration:none;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;
}

/* CERTS */
.certs-section{background:var(--deep)}
.cert-tabs{display:flex;gap:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:2rem}
.cert-tab{
  padding:.5rem 1.2rem;border-radius:8px;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  background:transparent;color:var(--muted);
  font-size:.82rem;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;
  transition:all .2s;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;
}
.cert-tab.active,.cert-tab:hover{
  background:rgba(200,146,42,.12);
  border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold2);
}
.cert-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));
  gap:1.2rem;
}
.cert-card{
  background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;
  transition:all .3s;
}
.cert-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.cert-thumb{
  width:100%;aspect-ratio:1.4/1;object-fit:cover;display:block;
  background:#1a2038;
}
.cert-info{padding:1rem}
.cert-provider{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--teal);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:.3rem}
.cert-name{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);line-height:1.3}
.cert-date{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:.3rem}

/* LIGHTBOX */
.lightbox{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1000;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.92);
  display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  padding:2rem;
}
.lightbox.open{display:flex}
.lightbox img{max-width:90vw;max-height:85vh;border-radius:8px;object-fit:contain}
.lightbox-close{
  position:absolute;top:1.5rem;right:2rem;
  background:none;border:none;color:#fff;font-size:2rem;cursor:pointer;
}
.lightbox-caption{
  position:absolute;bottom:2rem;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  color:#fff;font-size:.9rem;text-align:center;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);padding:.5rem 1.5rem;border-radius:20px;
}

/* SKILLS */
.skills-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:1rem}
.skill-item{
  background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:10px;padding:1.2rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;
}
.skill-icon{font-size:1.6rem}
.skill-text{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:500}
.skill-level{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--teal)}

/* FOOTER */
footer{
  background:var(--deep);
  border-top:1px solid var(--border);
  text-align:center;padding:3rem 2rem;
}
footer p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.85rem}
footer .footer-name{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;
  font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--gold2);margin-bottom:.5rem;
}

/* SCROLL ANIM */
.fade-up{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);transition:opacity .6s,transform .6s}
.fade-up.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}

/* HIDDEN CERT GROUPS */
.cert-group{display:none}
.cert-group.active{display:grid}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">Abdul Salam</div>
  <div class="nav-links">
   
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="top">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-orb orb1"></div>
  <div class="hero-orb orb2"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-badge">🎓 SE Student · Riphah International University</div>
    <h1>Abdul Salam</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Full-Stack Developer &amp; Network Enthusiast passionate about building real-world solutions — from internship platforms to bank management systems.</p>
    <div class="hero-tags">
      <span class="tag">JavaScript</span>
      <span class="tag">Node.js</span>
      <span class="tag">C++</span>
      <span class="tag">SQL</span>
      <span class="tag">Linux</span>
      <span class="tag">CCNA</span>
      <span class="tag">Agile</span>
      <span class="tag">Adobe Photoshop</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#projects" class="btn-primary">View Projects</a>
      <a href="#certifications" class="btn-sec">Certifications</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label"><span>01 · About</span></div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Who I Am</h2>
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-text fade-up">
        <p>I'm <strong>Abdul Salam</strong>, a Software Engineering student at <strong>Riphah International University</strong>. I build practical, well-structured software — from multi-role web platforms to data-structure powered systems.</p>
        <p>My academic journey has been shaped by hands-on projects, <strong>Cisco Networking Academy</strong> programs, and Coursera-certified courses — covering everything from low-level C++ and Linux to full-stack JavaScript and Agile methodologies.</p>
        <p>I actively participate in university societies and tech events, where I connect with industry professionals and fellow developers. I believe great software starts with great collaboration.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="about-text fade-up">
        <p><strong>Education:</strong> BS Software Engineering, Riphah International University</p>
        <p><strong>SAP ID:</strong> 49040</p>
        <p><strong>Interests:</strong> Networking, Full-Stack Development, Data Structures, UI/UX</p>
        <p><strong>Currently Learning:</strong> CCNA Networking, Advanced JavaScript, Database Design</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EVENTS / SOCIETY -->
<section class="event-section" id="events">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label"><span>02 · Events &amp; Society</span></div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Youth Insights & Training Workshop</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Active participation in university society events, technology workshops, and community training sessions at Riphah International University.</p>

    <!-- VC Description Card -->
    <div class="fade-up" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(200,146,42,.08),rgba(20,184,166,.06));border:1px solid rgba(200,146,42,.3);border-radius:16px;padding:2rem;margin-bottom:2.5rem">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:1rem">
        <span style="font-size:2.5rem">🎓</span>
        <div>
          <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.3rem;color:var(--gold2)">Vice Chancellor — Dr. Anees Ahmad</h3>
          <p style="color:var(--teal);font-size:.85rem;font-weight:600">Riphah International University</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p style="color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;font-size:.95rem">A distinguished academic leader photographed at a Youth Insights society event, standing alongside students — including participants from the university's SE program. The event brought together faculty, students, and industry representatives in shared academic dress, reflecting Riphah's commitment to connecting students with leadership and professional development opportunities. The occasion highlights the university's culture of mentorship, innovation, and community engagement.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- EVENT GALLERY - will be populated by JS -->
    <div class="event-grid" id="eventGrid">
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label"><span>03 · Projects</span></div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Featured Projects</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Real-world software built with purpose — from full-stack web apps to algorithmic systems.</p>
    <div class="projects-grid">

      <!-- InternBridge -->
      <div class="project-card fade-up">
        <div style="width:100%;aspect-ratio:16/9;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d2040,#1a3060);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:3rem;">🌉</div>
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-meta">
            <span class="project-tag">Node.js</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Express</span>
            <span class="project-tag">JWT</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Vanilla JS</span>
          </div>
          <h3>InternBridge</h3>
          <p>Smart Internship &amp; Industrial Training Management System. A full-stack web platform connecting students, P@SHA-verified companies, and university administrators for streamlined internship lifecycle management — applications, approvals, reporting, and complaints.</p>
          <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--teal);background:rgba(20,184,166,.07);padding:.8rem;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:1rem;line-height:1.7">
            4 roles: Student · Company · University Admin · System Admin<br>
            JWT Auth · REST API · Role-based Dashboards · City Reports
          </div>
          <div class="project-links">
            <span class="project-link">📁 Full-Stack App</span>
            <span class="project-link" style="color:var(--gold2)">⭐ Featured Project</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- DSA Bank System -->
      <div class="project-card fade-up">
        <div style="width:100%;aspect-ratio:16/9;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1000,#3a2800);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:3rem;">🏦</div>
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-meta">
            <span class="project-tag">C++</span>
            <span class="project-tag">DSA</span>
            <span class="project-tag">OOP</span>
          </div>
          <h3>Bank Management System</h3>
          <p>A Data Structures & Algorithms project implementing a full bank simulation in C++. Features account creation with unique ID generation, secure login/authentication, deposit/withdrawal, and balance management — all built with OOP principles and vector-based data structures.</p>
          <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--gold2);background:rgba(200,146,42,.07);padding:.8rem;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:1rem;line-height:1.7">
            Group: Abdul Salam · Muddasir Hayat Khan · M. Adnan Shafi<br>
            Account Class · Bank Class · Auth System · OOP Design
          </div>
          <div class="project-links">
            <span class="project-link">📄 DSA Project</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CERTIFICATIONS -->
<section class="certs-section" id="certifications">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label"><span>04 · Certifications</span></div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Certificates & Achievements</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Industry-recognized certifications from Cisco Networking Academy and Coursera — click any certificate to view full details.</p>

    <div class="cert-tabs">
      <button class="cert-tab active" onclick="filterCerts('all')">All Certificates</button>
      <button class="cert-tab" onclick="filterCerts('cisco')">🌐 Cisco / Riphah</button>
      <button class="cert-tab" onclick="filterCerts('coursera')">📚 Coursera</button>
    </div>

    <div class="cert-grid" id="certGrid"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section id="skills">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="section-label"><span>05 · Skills</span></div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Technical Skills</h2>
    <div class="skills-grid">
      <div class="skill-item fade-up"><span class="skill-icon">⚡</span><div><div class="skill-text">JavaScript</div><div class="skill-level">ES6+ · Full Stack</div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item fade-up"><span class="skill-icon">🟩</span><div><div class="skill-text">Node.js / Express</div><div class="skill-level">REST APIs · JWT</div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item fade-up"><span class="skill-icon">💠</span><div><div class="skill-text">C / C++</div><div class="skill-level">DSA · OOP</div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item fade-up"><span class="skill-icon">🗄️</span><div><div class="skill-text">SQL</div><div class="skill-level">DDL · DML · Relational</div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item fade-up"><span class="skill-icon">🐧</span><div><div class="skill-text">Linux</div><div class="skill-level">CLI · NDG Essentials</div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item fade-up"><span class="skill-icon">🌐</span><div><div class="skill-text">Networking</div><div class="skill-level">CCNA · IT Essentials</div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item fade-up"><span class="skill-icon">🎨</span><div><div class="skill-text">Adobe Photoshop</div><div class="skill-level">Flyer · GIF Design</div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item fade-up"><span class="skill-icon">🔄</span><div><div class="skill-text">Agile / Scrum</div><div class="skill-level">Design Thinking</div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item fade-up"><span class="skill-icon">🏗️</span><div><div class="skill-text">HTML5 · CSS3</div><div class="skill-level">Responsive Design</div></div></div>
      <div class="skill-item fade-up"><span class="skill-icon">🔐</span><div><div class="skill-text">Auth Systems</div><div class="skill-level">JWT · bcrypt</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-name">Abdul Salam</div>
  <p>SE Student · Riphah International University · SAP 49040</p>
  <p style="margin-top:.5rem">Built with passion &amp; code 💛</p>
</footer>

<!-- LIGHTBOX -->
<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox" onclick="closeLightbox()">
  <button class="lightbox-close" onclick="closeLightbox()">✕</button>
  <img id="lightboxImg" src="" alt=""/>
  <div class="lightbox-caption" id="lightboxCaption"></div>
</div>

<script>
// ============ CERT DATA ============
const CERTS = {
  "IT Essentials": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "JavaScript Essentials 1": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "JavaScript Essentials 2": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "C++ Programming Essentials": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "NDG Linux Essentials": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "CCNA: Introduction to Networks": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "Agile Meets Design Thinking": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "Command Line in Linux": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "High-Quality Flyer in Adobe Photoshop": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "Relational Modeling in Dia": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "SQL Data Definition & Manipulation": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "Animated GIF for Social Media - Photoshop": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "C++ Adjacency List Shortest Path": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "Coursera Project Certificate": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
};

const IMGS = {
  "img1": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "img2": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "img3": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "img4": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "img5": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "img6": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "img7": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "img8": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "img9": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "img10": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "img11": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "img12": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "img13": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "img14": "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
};


const CERT_DATA = [
  {name:"IT Essentials",provider:"Cisco Networking Academy · Riphah",date:"Jun 2025",category:"cisco",key:"IT Essentials"},
  {name:"JavaScript Essentials 1",provider:"Cisco Networking Academy · Riphah",date:"Sep 2024",category:"cisco",key:"JavaScript Essentials 1"},
  {name:"JavaScript Essentials 2",provider:"Cisco Networking Academy · Riphah",date:"Dec 2024",category:"cisco",key:"JavaScript Essentials 2"},
  {name:"CPA - Programming Essentials in C++",provider:"Cisco Networking Academy",date:"Jan 2023",category:"cisco",key:"C++ Programming Essentials"},
  {name:"NDG Linux Essentials",provider:"Cisco Networking Academy",date:"May 2024",category:"cisco",key:"NDG Linux Essentials"},
  {name:"CCNA: Introduction to Networks",provider:"Cisco Networking Academy · Riphah",date:"Apr 2025",category:"cisco",key:"CCNA: Introduction to Networks"},
  {name:"Agile Meets Design Thinking",provider:"Coursera · University of Virginia",date:"May 2024",category:"coursera",key:"Agile Meets Design Thinking"},
  {name:"Command Line in Linux",provider:"Coursera Project Network",date:"May 2024",category:"coursera",key:"Command Line in Linux"},
  {name:"High-Quality Flyer in Adobe Photoshop",provider:"Coursera Project",date:"May 2023",category:"coursera",key:"High-Quality Flyer in Adobe Photoshop"},
  {name:"Relational Modeling in Dia",provider:"Coursera Project",date:"Mar 2024",category:"coursera",key:"Relational Modeling in Dia"},
  {name:"SQL Data Definition & Manipulation",provider:"Coursera Project",date:"Apr 2024",category:"coursera",key:"SQL Data Definition & Manipulation"},
  {name:"Animated GIF for Social Media - Photoshop",provider:"Coursera Project",date:"May 2023",category:"coursera",key:"Animated GIF for Social Media - Photoshop"},
  {name:"C++ Adjacency List Shortest Path",provider:"Coursera Project",date:"Jan 2023",category:"coursera",key:"C++ Adjacency List Shortest Path"},
  {name:"Coursera Project Certificate",provider:"Coursera",date:"2024",category:"coursera",key:"Coursera Project Certificate"},
];

const EVENT_LABELS = [
  "YOUTH INSIGHTS — SOLIDARITY WALK FOR GAZA",
  "YOUTH INSIGHTS — SOLIDARITY WALK FOR GAZA",
"BizzTech Society — Society Members Group",
  "YOUTH INSIGHTS  — President Meetup with VC DR ANEES AHMAD",
"YOUTH INSIGHTS — SOLIDARITY WALK FOR GAZA",
          "IJT-Gaza March",
  "BIZZTECH - Event",
        "IJT-Gaza March",
  "Society Training Workshop — Full View",
  "YOUTH INSIGHTS— ORPHANAGE HOUSE VISIT ",
   "Society Training Workshop — Full View",
   "Society Training Workshop — Full View",

   "Society Training Workshop — Full View",

 "BizzTech Event — Student Presidents",

];

// Build cert grid
function buildCerts(filter) {
  const grid = document.getElementById('certGrid');
  grid.innerHTML = '';
  const items = filter === 'all' ? CERT_DATA : CERT_DATA.filter(c => c.category === filter);
  items.forEach(cert => {
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'cert-card';
    const imgSrc = CERTS[cert.key] || '';
    card.innerHTML = `
      <img class="cert-thumb" src="${imgSrc}" alt="${cert.name}" loading="lazy"/>
      <div class="cert-info">
        <div class="cert-provider">${cert.provider}</div>
        <div class="cert-name">${cert.name}</div>
        <div class="cert-date">${cert.date}</div>
      </div>
    `;
    card.onclick = () => openLightbox(imgSrc, cert.name + ' — ' + cert.provider);
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
}

// Build event grid
function buildEvents() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('eventGrid');
  grid.innerHTML = '';
  Object.keys(IMGS).forEach((key, i) => {
    const src = IMGS[key];
    const label = EVENT_LABELS[i] || 'BizzTech Event';
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'event-card' + (i === 8 ? ' event-featured' : '');
    card.innerHTML = `
      <img src="${src}" alt="${label}" loading="lazy"/>
      <div class="event-card-overlay">
        <div class="event-card-title">${label}</div>
      </div>
    `;
    card.onclick = () => openLightbox(src, label);
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
}

function filterCerts(cat) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.cert-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  event.target.classList.add('active');
  buildCerts(cat);
}

function openLightbox(src, caption) {
  document.getElementById('lightboxImg').src = src;
  document.getElementById('lightboxCaption').textContent = caption;
  document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}

function closeLightbox() {
  document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}

document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if(e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox(); });

// Scroll animations
const observer = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
}, {threshold:.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.fade-up').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

// Init
buildCerts('all');
buildEvents();
</script>
</body>
</html>
